overall.description: A first-person perspective gameplay video from Cyberpunk 2077. The clip begins with the player walking along a waterfront promenade in Night City at dusk, surrounded by neon-lit modern skyscrapers and palm trees. The scene transitions via a fade to a daytime rooftop shantytown where the player sits among other characters, observing a cluttered urban environment with holographic advertisements and rising steam.

turns left and ascends wide concrete stairs toward building entrance
turns right and descends stairs back toward waterfront canal

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a brief view of a concrete floor before transitioning to an open waterfront promenade at dusk. The player walks along a wet concrete pathway beside a canal, passing palm trees and modern glass towers illuminated with green neon lights. The camera turns left up a wide staircase then back down toward the water, while sparse NPCs stand around the area.

scene_state.functional_zone: cluttered rooftop shantytown with makeshift structures

events.description: fade to black and hard cut to completely different location and time of day
text 'Rooftop Shantytown' appears identifying the location
camera pans right revealing seated characters and more of the shantytown

agents.ego_description: sitting on a rooftop with legs stretched out on a cardboard mat, surrounded by bottles and a candle, observing the shantytown environment

notable_agents.action: sitting on couch wearing camouflage pants and jacket, holding a drink
sitting on couch wearing blue leggings and red top, looking at phone

entered.detail: tall building covered in colorful holographic displays and Japanese-inspired signage
steam rising from ground vents creating atmospheric effect
large industrial metal beams and walkways overhead
wooden structure with white awning and outdoor seating
large water puddles reflecting the surrounding buildings
flattened cardboard box serving as a mat with bottles and candle

segments.scene_description: Following a fade transition, the scene shifts to a bright daytime rooftop shantytown. The player is sitting with legs visible, surrounded by discarded bottles on a cardboard mat. Two other characters sit on a nearby couch while colorful holographic advertisements cover the distant skyscrapers. Steam rises from vents in the weathered concrete floor as the camera pans to reveal the cluttered, makeshift environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous perspective that shifts from a sleek, neon-lit waterfront at dusk to a cluttered, sun-drenched rooftop shantytown. It begins with a brief view of a concrete floor before opening onto a wet promenade beside a canal, where the camera moves past palm trees and glass towers glowing with green neon. After ascending a wide staircase and turning back toward the water, the scene fades and transforms into a bright daytime environment. The perspective shifts to a seated position on a cardboard mat surrounded by discarded bottles, while steam rises from weathered concrete vents. Finally, the camera pans across the makeshift rooftop to reveal other characters resting on a couch against a backdrop of distant skyscrapers and colorful holographic advertisements.
